title: Clinical Care Quick Reference | Covid | CDC
text:
y Immunocompromised People 
COVID-19 vaccine information for people who are moderately or severely immunocompromised. 
Multisystem Inflammatory Syndrome (MIS) 
Find information on this rare but serious condition associated with COVID-19.
Clinical Overview of Multisystem Inflammatory Syndrome in Children 
MIS-C signs and symptoms, testing, patient management, and follow-up guidance. 
Clinical Treatment of Multisystem Inflammatory Syndrome in Children 
Provides health care practitioners with evidence-based best practices for treating MIS. 
Case Definitions and Reporting 
Provide case definitions and reporting protocol for providers treating patients with MIS. 
Post-COVID conditions 
Find information on physical and mental health conditions that can arise after an initial SARS-CoV-2 infection (the virus that causes COVID-19).
Clinical Overview of Long COVID 
Clinical information about Long COVID, including research, and resources for healthcare providers. 
The Public Health Approach to Long COVID 
Information on Long COVID public health strategies and resources. 
Children and women who are pregnant or recently pregnant 
Find information and clinical considerations for the diagnosis and management of pediatric patients infected with SARS-CoV-2 and clinical considerations for current or recent pregnancy.
